bug.description: F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption

prompt:
There is a F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption downstream of function wls_mac_print_stats in the nfapi/oai_integration/wls_integration subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/oai_integration/wls_integration/wls_vnf.c:200.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
